workflow.name: playwright-git
workflow.yaml:
apiVersion: testworkflows.testkube.io/v1
kind: TestWorkflow
metadata:
  name: playwright-git
  labels:
    tool: playwright
    category: e2e-ui-testing
spec:
  content:
    git:
      uri: https://github.com/kubeshop/testkube
      revision: main
      paths:
      - test/playwright/playwright-project
  container:
    image: mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.56.1
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 1500m
        memory: 1500Mi
    workingDir: /data/repo/test/playwright/playwright-project
  steps:
  - name: Install dependencies
    shell: npm ci
  - name: Run Playwright tests
    run:
      shell: |
        mkdir /data/artifacts
        npx playwright test --reporter=list,junit,html --trace on
      env:
      - name: PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT_NAME
        value: "/data/artifacts/junit-report.xml"
      - name: PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_REPORT
        value: /data/artifacts/playwright-report
    steps:
    - name: Save artifacts
      condition: always
      workingDir: /data/artifacts/
      artifacts:
        paths:
        - '**/*'
